message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame any/all (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame-level boolean
reductions (axis=0, skipna=True default):

- any_basic: column 'a' has a truthy value -> True; column 'b' is
  all zeros -> False
- all_basic: column 'a' is all-truthy -> True; column 'b' has a
  zero -> False

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.any()/.all() and emits expected_series), runs the Rust
DataFrame.any()/.all(), and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. DataFrameAny / DataFrameAll were already
wired through the Series response branch; this fills the live-oracle
test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-dgw4j]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
